message:
perf(visual-fx,layout): hoist loop-invariant math and migrate layout cache to FxHash

Three micro-optimization passes targeting hot inner loops:

metaballs.rs:
  Precompute per-row dy-squared values for each ball outside the inner
  (dx) pixel loop. Since ny and ball.y are constant within a row, this
  saves 1 subtraction and 1 multiplication per ball per pixel. Uses a
  fixed [f64; 16] stack array to avoid heap allocation. Also caches
  ball_count to avoid repeated .len() calls.

plasma.rs:
  Hoist 4 per-frame time-derived constants (time*0.6, time*0.8,
  time*1.2, time*0.5) out of the double pixel loop. These were
  previously recomputed at every pixel; now computed once per frame and
  referenced by name, which also improves readability.

cache.rs (ftui-layout):
  Replace std::collections::HashMap with rustc_hash::FxHashMap and
  DefaultHasher with FxHasher throughout the layout cache. FxHash is
  significantly faster for small integer-like keys (layout cache keys
  are u64 hashes of constraints, rects, and intrinsics). Applied to
  both LayoutCache and CoherenceCache, including their constructors
  and the hash_constraints/hash_intrinsics helper functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
